name: Cluster Usage Report Readonly
summary: Collect read-only Slurm usage evidence for facility support reports.
description: This skill helps HPC support teams collect portable, read-only Slurm accounting, queue, and partition evidence for usage reviews without changing scheduler or cluster state.

tools.name: sacct
tools.notes: Accounting visibility depends on site Slurm policy.

tools.name: sreport
tools.notes: Useful for utilization summaries when enabled by the site.

inputs.name: days
inputs.description: Number of recent days to include in accounting reports.

inputs.name: account
inputs.description: Optional Slurm account filter for sites that expose account-scoped accounting.

inputs.name: output_dir
inputs.description: Directory where text reports should be written.

outputs.name: usage_report_dir
outputs.description: A directory containing read-only Slurm accounting, utilization, queue, and partition snapshots.

outputs.name: summary
outputs.description: A summary file describing report scope, generated files, and review reminders.

examples.title: Collect a read-only Slurm usage report

tests.description: Validate the manifest and report script reference.
Check shell syntax without contacting a scheduler.
Run on a Slurm site with accounting access and confirm the generated report contains only public or approved operational data before sharing.
